hooks.command: if [[ "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" == *.cs ]]; then dotnet format core/Dignite.Vault.Extract.slnx --include "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" --no-restore --verbosity quiet 2>/dev/null || true; fi
if [[ "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" == */Migrations/* ]]; then echo 'Blocked: regenerate via dotnet ef migrations add instead of editing migration files directly' >&2; exit 2; fi
